authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

reaches.name: Sagehen Creek — closed reach at Station Headquarters
reaches.fromDesc: The stream gauging station, located about 1/8 mile below Sagehen Creek Station Headquarters
reaches.toDesc: About 1/8 mile above the station headquarters, at a point where the stream splits into two sections

reaches.name: Sagehen Creek — Highway 89 bridge to gauging station
reaches.toDesc: Upstream to the gauging station at the east boundary of the Sagehen Creek Station

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(127) — Sagehen Creek (Nevada Co.)
sources.quotedText: (127) Sagehen Creek (Nevada Co.). (A) From the stream gauging station (located about 1/8 mile below Sagehen Creek Station Headquarters) upstream to about 1/8 mile above the station headquarters at a point where the stream splits into two sections. Closed to all fishing all year. (B) From the Highway 89 bridge upstream to the gauging station at the east boundary of the Sagehen Creek Station. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Getting Here — Sagehen Creek Field Station (UC Natural Reserve System)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Closed to all fishing all year from the stream gauging station (about 1/8 mile below Station Headquarters) upstream to about 1/8 mile above the headquarters, at the point where the stream splits into two sections. This protects the UC Berkeley Sagehen Creek Field Station research reach.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year around the Sagehen Creek Station Headquarters research reach
regulations.verbatimText: From the stream gauging station (located about 1/8 mile below Sagehen Creek Station Headquarters) upstream to about 1/8 mile above the station headquarters at a point where the stream splits into two sections. Closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release only, from the Highway 89 bridge upstream to the gauging station at the east boundary of the station
regulations.verbatimText: From the Highway 89 bridge upstream to the gauging station at the east boundary of the Sagehen Creek Station. All year.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used, Highway 89 bridge to the gauging station
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout — catch-and-release only, Highway 89 bridge to the gauging station

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.
